data.text: UPON FINDING A LITHIUM-BARREN GREY GIANT ON MY WAY TO 0, 0, INFINITY I
CAME TO THIS GREY GIANT WHICH, TO MY ANNOYANCE, IS ALSO BARREN. I WANTED
TO MAKE IT MY TURNAROUND POINT AT WHICH TIME I WOULD START HEADING BACK
BECAUSE I FEAR THAT THESE COMMENTS ARE TOO FAR AWAY TO BE READ; HOWEVER,
I WILL NEED TO FIND ANOTHER STAR FOR THE REFUELING AND THE PLACEMENT OF
